nasb.text: Or the seven loaves of the four thousand, and how many large baskets full you picked up?

esv.text: Or the seven loaves for the four thousand, and how many baskets you gathered?

cnv.text: 還是忘記了那七個餅分給四千人，又裝滿了多少個大籃子呢？

ccb.text: 也不记得那七个饼给四千人吃饱，又装满多少筐子吗？

csbs.text: 也不记得那七个饼给四千人，你们收拾了几个筐子的碎块吗？
